creator: cs@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Your suggestion turns out to be a bad suggestion in terms of security. One should never run arm as the tor user, instead one should add his users to the _tor group. See also: 

https://lists.torproject.org/pipermail/tor-relays/2014-April/004412.html 

https://bugs.torproject.org/10702 

Fix: we should add a pkg-message telling the user to add himself to _tor group
